caption: In a soccer stadium with red seating and a green grass pitch, several players in blue training gear practice. In the background, red stands feature various advertisements, including "PULEVA" and "IDEAL," while a perimeter board displays "CERVEZAS ALHAMBRA" and "LaLiga Santander." A white soccer ball sits on the grass. In the initial sequence, players are spread across the field, with one player in blue moving toward the center. As the scene progresses, the focus shifts to a closer shot of a player in a blue training kit and black pants standing on the pitch. He is accompanied by a man wearing a black mask and a black t-shirt with "Fly Emirates" on the front. Behind them, a soccer goal is visible, and a perimeter board features the text "l Veleta" and "Ruta del Veleta." The players remain relatively stationary as the camera angle changes.
